$uid..read: auth != null && (auth.uid === $uid || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'admin' || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'super_admin')
$uid..write: auth != null && (auth.uid === $uid || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'admin' || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'super_admin')

$companyId..write: auth != null && (data.child('ownerId').val() === auth.uid || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'admin' || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'super_admin' || !data.exists())

$jobId..write: auth != null && (data.child('postedBy').val() === auth.uid || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'admin' || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'super_admin' || !data.exists())

$applicationId..read: auth != null && (data.child('seekerId').val() === auth.uid || root.child('companies/' + data.child('companyId').val() + '/ownerId').val() === auth.uid || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'admin')
$applicationId..write: auth != null && (data.child('seekerId').val() === auth.uid || root.child('companies/' + data.child('companyId').val() + '/ownerId').val() === auth.uid || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'admin' || !data.exists())
